title: Who is the strongest woman in your life?
description: March 8 is International Women's Day. 7NEWS hit the streets to ask Aussies who the strongest women in their life are. #iwd #internationalwomensday #streetinterview #news #voxpop

title: 7NEWS Archive: A year after the disappearance of MH370
description: It has been 12 years since Malaysian Airlines flight MH370 disappeared as it remains the biggest mystery in aviation history. The plane went missing en route from Kuala Lumpur to Beijing  which carried 12 crew members and 227 passengers, including 7 Australian citizens and residents.    A new search began in December 2025 led by private robotics company Ocean Infinity, with Malaysia's transport ministry saying the mission offers the highest chance yet of locating the lost plane. If wreckage is found in waters about 3km deep, investigators hope the aircraft's black boxes - the cockpit voice recorder and flight data recorder - can be recovered. #MH370 #missing #plane #aviation #anniversary

title: Air France repatriation flight turns back due to missile fire
description: An Air France flight chartered by the French government to evacuate French nationals from the United Arab Emirates (UAE) was forced to turn back due to missile attacks near Dubai, according to French officials.  This animation from Flightradar24 shows the moment the aircraft turned around after crossing into UAE airspace.  #airfrance #uae #flightradar

title: Appelbee family reunites with rescue team who saved their lives
description: The Appelbee family have not let their ordeal scare them, as they return to the ocean for their first swim since 13-year-old Austin Appelbee's incredible feat. #austinappelbee #appelbeefamily #rescue

title: Britain prepares aircraft carrier to set sail
description: Britain is preparing one of its aircraft carriers to set sail as the war in the Middle East ramps up. This decision was met with a hit from Trump, saying "we don't need them anymore". #uk #us #middleeast

title: Middle East war ramps up
description: The war in the Middle East is intensifying with multiple, fresh attacks exploding overnight. The US and Israel are targeting sites inside Iran, wiping out an oil refinery near Tehran. A dramatic attack near Dubai airport was also launched by Iran, briefly stopping flights from the UAE. #iran #middleeast #tehran

description: Iran has launched drone attacks on Dubai International Airport, with Australians among thousands of passengers witnessing explosions near the main terminal. Israel is also deploying ground forces to Lebanon's border region to target Hezbollah positions as the multi-front Middle Eastern conflict escalates.
